appendContent.description: Content to put at the top of the exported sheet. An array of ExcelRow objects, see [Extra Content section](./excel-export-extra-content/).

prependContent.description: Content to put at the bottom of the exported sheet. An array of ExcelRow objects, see [Extra Content section](./excel-export-extra-content/).

customMetadata.description: Custom metadata to be written to in the exported file. Values are serialised as strings.

suppressGridNotesExport.description: Set to `true` to suppress automatic export of cell notes from `notesDataSource`. See [Notes](./excel-export-notes/).

processNoteCallback.description: A callback invoked for each exported cell, allowing Excel notes/comments to be customised, injected, or suppressed. See [Notes](./excel-export-notes/).

suppressPrependAuthorToNotes.description: Set to `true` to suppress prepending the author name as bold text in the exported Excel note body. The note author is still stored in the exported Excel note metadata. See [Notes](./excel-export-notes/).

note.description: Optional note/comment to export for this cell. This can be used with custom content rows as well as grid body cells.

author.description: Optional author name displayed in the exported Excel note. When omitted, the document `author` is used.

meta.description: Properties available on the `ExcelHeaderFooter` interface. At least one of header or footer is required or both.

header.description: An array of maximum 3 items (`Left`, `Center`, `Right`), containing header configurations.

footer.description: An array of maximum 3 items (`Left`, `Center`, `Right`), containing footer configurations.

meta.description: Configuration for worksheet protection, used by `ExcelExportParams.protectSheet`.
